AR1.justification: No execution occurred (final_response null, no actions); nothing was routed anywhere, which avoids misrouting but cannot earn a positive routing score.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: The notes reference tmp/adr-draft.md and decisions.md by relative name without breakage, but no actual links or anchors were emitted to evaluate.

AR4.justification: No mutations performed, so the workspace is trivially idempotent on re-run.
